Risk Desc:
n yesterdays QA Sync up call, we got to know that there is a new environment QA going to get in which will be the final one. We do not know much about these details and on the timelines of this new environment yet. It looks like Global Helix may not satisfy certain of the production like aspects and hence this new environment.
 
With Helix, QA created a very strict timelines to complete execution of all the requirements including re-testing every item that were initially tested in DevTest and Global Test. This also included one hour of additional work per day from each QA during Helix retesting period. This plan was already stringent, and any deviation would pose a risk in QA completion on time.
 
Now, with this new environment, QA, we heard in the QA Sync up call that we may not need entire retesting as new QA will be getting in. Rather a regression will be enough. Currently we do not have the details on the new QA timelines. But this is going to be a risk for QA to complete as planned with the additional retesting getting in place. Also switching into multiple environments involves additional rework from QA.

QA environment readiness check
